name: Midnight Circuit
description: Electric violet circuitry suspended over a deep graphite workspace.
descriptionZh: 深石墨工作区里悬浮着电紫色数字回路。

name: Crimson Eclipse
description: A restrained red eclipse cuts through a near-black editorial shell.
descriptionZh: 克制的红色日蚀划过近黑色编辑空间。

name: Aurora Glass
description: Cold cyan aurora light drifts behind calm translucent work surfaces.
descriptionZh: 冷青极光在沉静的半透明工作界面后流动。
